patch.value: Config-driven custom item types: wire schema/types.json into runtime schema

Dogfood 2026-05-22 BLOCKER: pm init scaffolds .agents/pm/schema/types.json with {definitions:[]}, implying custom types register there, but the loader reads type_definitions_from_file and never merges it into the runtime schema (only settings.json item_types.definitions works; custom STATUSES do merge from schema/statuses.json). pm create MyType errors with Allowed: <hardcoded list>. Fix: (a) merge schema/types.json definitions into mergedSchema like statuses/fields, AND/OR (b) add a CLI to register a type (pm config set item-type / pm schema add-type), AND (c) make the invalid-type error hint where to register types. Aligns with project goal: schema defined by config, not hardcoded.

author: claude-code-agent
message: Implementing config-driven custom item types: pm schema add-type command + invalid-type error hint pointing agents to schema/types.json registration.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Orientation 2026-05-23 (empirical, isolated temp project, build 2026.5.23): Part (a) is ALREADY DONE on main. readSettingsWithMetadata (src/core/store/settings.ts:706-716) now merges loadRuntimeSchemaFromOptionalFiles().type_definitions_from_file into item_types.definitions, and runtime-schema.ts:506-512 reads schema/types.json. Verified: writing {definitions:[{name:'Spike',...}]} to .agents/pm/schema/types.json then `pm create Spike "..."` succeeds (created pm-3tg5, type=Spike). Remaining gaps = (b) no CLI to register a type (must hand-edit JSON) and (c) the invalid-type error (create.ts:1581-1584, update.ts:1736) only says 'Allowed: <list>' with generic examples — it never tells an agent custom types exist or how to add one. Scope this slice to (b)+(c): add `pm schema add-type` and make the invalid-type error point to it + schema/types.json.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Shipped (b) pm schema add-type + (c) discoverable invalid-type hint. New files: src/core/schema/item-types-file.ts (pure logic: parse/upsert/serialize types.json, normalizeAddTypeInput w/ built-in collision guard, buildInvalidTypeHint/buildInvalidTypeError; vitest-included, 100% covered by tests/unit/item-types-file.spec.ts) and src/cli/commands/schema.ts (runSchemaAddType: init guard, governance/lock via schema-types lock id, atomic write+rollback, on-write hooks, JSON envelope + human line; tested via tests/unit/schema-command.spec.ts). Wired: index.ts, register-mutation.ts (schema cmd + subcommand dispatch), mcp/server.ts (case schema), sdk/cli-contracts.ts (PM_CORE_COMMAND_NAMES, PM_TOOL_ACTIONS, SCHEMA_FLAG_CONTRACTS + dispatch, PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCHEMA_CONTRACTS.schema, new param props/metadata), contracts.ts, completion.ts (bash/zsh/fish), docs/COMMANDS.md, docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md, CHANGELOG [Unreleased]. Hint wired into create.ts + update.ts throw sites. Verification: pnpm build OK; pnpm quality:static OK; focused 28/28; full coverage 1515 tests, 100% stmts/branches/funcs/lines; check-secrets clean; temp-dir dogfood confirmed fail-with-hint -> register -> create-succeeds, idempotent alias merge, built-in collision rejected. No package.json version change.
